overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain trail at night. The character traverses from a forested path through rocky terrain to a lakeside meadow under an overcast sky with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with distant snow-capped peak

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant mountain peak

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow visible on the summit against the dark sky
dirt trail winding through the valley floor
sparse pine trees lining the sides of the trail
green grassy areas alongside the dirt path
overcast night sky with dark teal clouds

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt trail through an open mountain valley at night. The snow-capped peak looms ahead under a dark overcast sky, with scattered trees and grass lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain path with rock outcroppings

events.description: trail enters denser forest area with large rock formations appearing on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the path becomes grassy and winds through rockier terrain with denser trees

entered.detail: large boulder outcroppings beside the path
thick cluster of trees ahead blocking partial view of the mountain

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to grassy terrain as Geralt enters a more densely forested area. Large rock outcroppings appear on the left while the snow-capped mountain remains visible through the trees ahead.

events.description: path curves right revealing a large body of water on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the path as it curves to reveal a lake or river on the right side

entered.detail: calm lake or river reflecting the dark sky
gentle slopes covered in forest vegetation

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a serene body of water on the right as the path curves along the shoreline. The mountain peak remains visible ahead while the terrain opens into a grassy meadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow path along water's edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the waterside path through the expansive open meadow

entered.detail: expansive open field of tall grass on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the path bordering the water through an expansive grassy meadow. The mountain range stretches across the horizon under the dark night sky as the water recedes into the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a sparse valley into a dense forest before opening into a wide lakeside meadow. It begins with Geralt walking a dirt path through an open valley under a dark overcast sky, with a looming snow-capped peak ahead. As the terrain shifts to grass, the camera follows him into a more densely forested area where large rock outcroppings emerge on the left. The scene then opens as the forest clears, revealing a serene body of water on the right while the path curves along the shoreline toward the distant mountain. Finally, the environment expands into a vast grassy meadow where the water recedes into the distance and the full mountain range stretches across the night horizon.
